scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock']) fs.rmSync(f,{force:true}); const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; const execPath=process.env.npm_execpath||''; if (!/^pnpm\//.test(ua) && !/pnpm/i.test(execPath)) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm run test:libs && pnpm run test:web && pnpm run test:mobile && pnpm run test:api && pnpm run test:e2e
